name: legal officers in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For legal officers in law firms processing 5–15 contracts/month, manual tracking of compliance metrics causes missed compliance deadlines. We provide automated compliance monitoring instead of manual tracking of compliance metrics.

problem_solved: Ensuring contract compliance and avoiding penalties.
